artifacts.preview:
Use skill chatgpt-remote-image-service to execute this Node Execution Request.

# Node Execution Request

Runtime context:
- runtime_id: youtube-wiki
- instance_id: wiki-sop-new-instance
- workflow_id: youtube-research-wiki
- node_id: chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q
- node_run_id: node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467

Input contract:
- entry_inputs: {
  "prompt": "生成一张小猫睡觉的照片"
}
- input_manifest_path: raw/node-runs/node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467/inputs/sources/manifest.json
- input_directory: raw/node-runs/node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467/inputs/sources
- source_url: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
- Only use files listed in the input manifest unless the selected skill already has a stricter rule.

Relay context:
No upstream relay context was provided for this run.

Approved Edge Handoff Guide:
No approved Edge Handoff Guide was resolved for this run.

Output contract:
- output_directory: raw/node-runs/node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467/outputs
- output_manifest_path: raw/node-runs/node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467/outputs/manifest.json
- receipt_path: raw/node-runs/node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467/agent/receipt.json
- Do not report success unless the declared output manifest and receipt are written or the runtime wrapper writes equivalent state that the adapter can verify.

Execution command:
```bash

```
If the execution command is empty, execute the selected skill directly from this request: read entry_inputs, input_directory, input_manifest and the approved handoff guide, then write outputs to output_directory and output_manifest_path.


Execution rules:
- Use the selected skill only: chatgpt-remote-image-service.
- Run the command from the Instance workspace unless the skill has an equivalent deterministic wrapper.
- Preserve the provided environment variables.
- Do not invent paths.
- If execution fails, return the failure and include stderr/log guidance.

artifacts.title: Hermes Agent Response
artifacts.preview:
## Node Execution Complete — SUCCESS

**Node:** `chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q`  
**Run ID:** `node-run-chatgpt-remote-image-service-vs2q-20260629T192437-4b8467`  
**Exit Code:** `0`  
**Worker:** `worker-1` (CDP port 9333)

### Input
- Prompt: `生成一张小猫睡觉的照片` (pure text, no reference image)

### Pipeline (browser stages completed)
```
connectBrowser → enterImageMode → fillPrompt → clickSend → waitForGeneratedImage → downloadImage → uploadImage
```

### Outputs

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **public_image_url** | `https://resource.vyibc.com/82ef0526-4ec7-462e-956b-a287c9b8f55b.png` |
| **task_id** | `82ef0526-4ec7-462e-956b-a287c9b8f55b` |
| **chatgpt_url** | `https://chatgpt.com/c/6a42c6a5-24fc-83ea-b73f-803a859cf587` |
| **total time** | ~60s (59886ms) |
| **timings** | connected=988ms, pageReady=2025ms, sent=9988ms, generatedVisible=46744ms, downloaded=59259ms, uploaded=59886ms |

### Written artifacts
- `raw/node-runs/.../outputs/manifest.json` — output manifest (9 items: result, image_url, public_image_url, status, task_id, status_json, submit_json, generated_images, images)
- `raw/node-runs/.../agent/receipt.json` — execution receipt with full metadata and timings

No blockers encountered — all browser workers were logged in, the job queued and completed on the first attempt.
